_description: Expected ordered client-observable event sequence for one happy-path run of quiz /41 (hairquizSpec, 18 screens idx 0-17). The intro cover (idx 0, s_goal) is now a dream-question screen — tapping a card records hairDream, fires Quiz Started + Question Answered at position 0, and auto-advances. s_hair_dream (old idx 3) has been removed; all subsequent screen positions shift down by 1 vs the /40 (long-hair-v1) baseline.
_trackingRules:
CORRECTED 2026-06 against the FlutterFlow source (track_g_a_event.dart + every call site). Three rules every quiz follows — see docs/reference/tracking-contract.md §'Event property rules':
  1. POSITION = the RAW 0-based screen index (the screen's index in spec.screens, == FlutterFlow's PageView page index). NOT a question-only count. So EVERY screen — questions, pitches, loading, email, result — has its OWN distinct position. (The old build used questionPosition (a question count), which made a pitch reuse the prior question's number.)
  2. PER-EVENT PROPS ARE ALWAYS RESET. trackGAEvent always sets question_id ('' when N/A), question ('' when N/A) and selected_answer (the array, else null). GTM's Data Layer Variables persist across pushes, so an OMITTED key keeps its prior value — that is why the old build's 'Continued From Pitch' / 'Viewed Results Page' showed the LAST question's id+answer. selected_answer uses null (not []) because GTM merges arrays by index, so [] would leave a stale array in place; null overwrites/clears.
  3. 'Quiz Viewed' fires EXACTLY ONCE, on the first screen (idx 0, the start cover), before any interaction — the 'landing on the quiz' event. (FlutterFlow fired it on every screen's mount; that double-counted and is intentionally not reproduced.)
_41flow: Quiz /41 DIFFERS from /40 (long-hair-v1): idx 0 s_goal is now a DREAM-QUESTION COVER — tapping a card calls answer() which fires Quiz Started (position 0, question_id 'hairDream') immediately before Question Answered (position 0, selected_answer ['dream_length']). There is NO separate s_hair_dream question screen. All subsequent screen positions shift down by 1 vs /40.
_capture: Hand-authored from the corrected tracking rules + the definitive index->screen map (npx tsx). The e2e (e2e/golden.spec.ts) walks the REAL quiz and asserts the captured dataLayer sequence equals this fixture (event-name sequence strict-equal; each payload toMatchObject). Answer-bearing + completion + checkout events ALSO carry ADDITIVE FB-targeting enrichment keys (spec.eventEnrichment: hairConcern/age, keyed by questionId); those are NOT part of the byte-for-byte contract and are OMITTED here — the gate asserts the golden keys as a SUBSET, so additive keys are allowed but not required.
_orderingAssumptions: Only client-observable events are listed in expectedEvents, in fire order. 'position' is the RAW 0-based screen index (spec.screens index); each screen has its own.

channel:'cvg' entries ($page_load, Completed Quiz) are NOT pushed to window.dataLayer and are NOT captured by the e2e harness (which no-ops window.trackEvent and stubs the webhook). They are listed for contract completeness only.

React StrictMode double-invokes mount effects in dev, firing 'Quiz Viewed'/'Quiz Completed'/'Viewed Results Page' twice on a screen's mount; the gate dedupes CONSECUTIVE identical (event+position) events, so each view appears once — matching this list.

The s_goal cover fires Quiz Viewed (once, position 0) then on the dream-card tap: Quiz Started (position 0, question_id 'hairDream') immediately followed by Question Answered (position 0, selected_answer ['dream_length']). The happy-path picks hairDream=dream_length, hairConcern=concern_hairloss (load-bearing for the c_hl coupon + CDP map); other questions take any valid answer.
The final 'Go to  checkout' (TWO spaces) fires on the dashboard CTA tap AFTER 'Viewed Results Page', so the captured in-walk sequence excludes it; the gate asserts it separately.
Converge 'Completed Quiz' (converge.ts) and the Worker webhook POST both fire on the same submit tap; submitWebhook() is awaited first, then trackConvergeCompletedQuiz().
downstreamServerEvents fire asynchronously on the Worker after the 202 response; they are NOT client-observable and are listed separately.

expectedEvents._note: auto on page load; NOT captured in dataLayer; via publishing header / GTM relay
fires ONCE, on the first-screen view, before any interaction
fires on dream-card tap (first user interaction); question_id is hairDream (the cover IS a question in /41). No selected_answer — fires immediately BEFORE the paired Question Answered.
expectedEvents.question: What's your hair dream?

expectedEvents._note: hairDream recorded at the cover screen (idx 0); this is the NEW event that /40 did not have.
expectedEvents.question: What's your hair dream?
Which hair type do you have?

expectedEvents._note: s_concern is now idx 3 (was idx 4 in /40); the prompt is a hairDream-keyed conditional resolving to the dream_length case.
expectedEvents.question: Is there anything that might be getting in the way of your dream to have longer hair?
What best describes your current haircare routine?

expectedEvents._note: Damage Pitch is now idx 5 (was idx 6 in /40). question_id '' + selected_answer null = clean.

How much do you spend on a bottle of shampoo?
Which of these hair care myths do you believe?
Select the damaging practices that you regularly do
My reflection in the mirror affects my mood and self-esteem.
I tend to compare my hair to others' and it makes me frustrated.
Did a professional refer you to us?

expectedEvents._note: GA-only lifecycle (NOT the Converge 'Completed Quiz') — fires on the email/contact-details screen VIEW (idx 16 in /41). question_id '' + selected_answer null = clean.
expectedEvents.question: Contact Details Form

expectedEvents._note: client Converge event via converge.ts on submit; NOT captured in dataLayer (trackEvent no-op in e2e)
result is now idx 17 in /41. question 'Result Page' overwrites the email view's stale 'Contact Details Form'; question_id '' + selected_answer null = clean.
expectedEvents.question: Result Page

expectedEvents._note: TWO spaces between 'to' and 'checkout' — exact string; fires on dashboard CTA tap AFTER results render, so it is asserted separately from the in-walk captured sequence

expectedCheckout._paramNote: __cvg_uid / __cvg_sid appended only if found in cookie or URL fallback
